bugs_verified_already_fixed.description: Faction default 0 vs 20 mismatch — already fixed: FACTION_SCORE_START=20 in merlin_constants.gd:1143, used by build_default_factions() and save_system
Deterministic minigame selection — already fixed: pick_minigame_for_field uses randi() not hash()%size

overall_assessment: Human feedback cleanup cycle. 12 dead files deleted (3 scene systems + helpers + .uid files). 2 MEDIUM bugs confirmed pre-fixed. Zero known bugs. Codebase ready for gameplay features.
